package rulecoverage

func PositiveAwsSessionPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "aws_session_per_request"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`session.NewSession()` or `config.LoadDefaultConfig(ctx)` inside handler functions"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
